home.metaDescription: Your go-to source for the latest news, in-depth articles, and expert insights on technology, travel, sports, finance, and more.
home.travelSubHeading: Click on the icon to enjoy the music
home.becomeAnAuthorHeading: Become an author and share your great stories
home.becomeAnAuthorDescription: Become an author you can earn extra income by writing articles. Read and share new perspectives on just about any topic. Everyone's welcome.

about.title: About Us
about.aboutSubheading: {siteName} is a platform dedicated to sharing insightful articles, stories, and perspectives. We believe in the power of words to inform, inspire, and connect communities around the world.
about.missionDescription: We strive to create a space where writers and readers come together to explore ideas, share knowledge, and engage in meaningful conversations. Our goal is to make quality content accessible to everyone.
about.qualityContentDescription: Every article is crafted with care, ensuring accuracy and depth on topics that matter.
about.communityDrivenDescription: Our platform empowers writers to share their voice and readers to discover new perspectives.
about.openPlatformDescription: Anyone can contribute, comment, and engage — because great ideas can come from anywhere.
about.growingDescription: Our community is constantly expanding as more writers share their content and readers discover stories that resonate with them.
about.publishedArticlesDescription: Quality posts covering a wide range of topics and categories.
about.contentCategoriesDescription: Organized collections spanning diverse interests and expertise.
about.contributingAuthorsDescription: Talented writers sharing their knowledge and perspectives.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question, suggestion, or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you.

newsletter.newsletterDescription: Read and share new perspectives on just about any topic. Everyone's welcome.

authorProfile.hideDialogBody: Are you sure you want to hide {name}? This action will hide all posts from this author.
authorProfile.reportDialogBody: Are you sure you want to report "{name}"? This action will report this author.

legal.privacyIntro: At {siteName}, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website at {siteUrl}.
legal.personalDataIntro: When you register for an account, we may collect personally identifiable information such as:
legal.personalDataItem4: Any other information you voluntarily provide
legal.usageDataDescription: We may automatically collect information about how you access and use the website, including your IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, pages visited, and the dates and times of your visits.
legal.howWeUseIntro: We use the information we collect to:
legal.howWeUseItem1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
legal.howWeUseItem4: Respond to your comments and questions
legal.howWeUseItem5: Analyze usage patterns to improve user experience
legal.howWeUseItem6: Prevent fraud and enforce our terms
legal.sharingIntro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
legal.dataSecurityDescription: We use commercially reasonable measures to protect your personal data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.
legal.yourRightsItem1: Access the personal data we hold about you
legal.yourRightsItem3: Request deletion of your account and personal data
legal.thirdPartyLinksDescription: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites.
legal.changesToPolicyDescription: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
legal.contactUsPrivacy: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at {email}.
legal.termsIntro: Welcome to {siteName}. By accessing or using our website at {siteUrl}, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
legal.accountRegistrationIntro: To access certain features, you may need to create an account. You agree to:
legal.accountRegistrationItem1: Provide accurate and complete information during registration
legal.accountRegistrationItem2: Keep your login credentials secure and confidential
legal.accountRegistrationItem3: Accept responsibility for all activity under your account
legal.accountRegistrationItem4: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
legal.accountApprovalNote: New accounts are subject to admin approval before activation.
legal.userContentIntro: You retain ownership of the content you submit (posts, comments, media). By submitting content, you grant {siteName} a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute your content on the platform.
legal.termsContactDescription: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at {email}.
legal.cookieIntro: This Cookie Policy explains how {siteName} ({siteUrl}) uses cookies and similar technologies to recognise you when you visit our website.
legal.whatAreCookiesDescription: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently and to provide information to the site owners.
legal.howWeUseCookiesIntro: We use the following types of cookies:
legal.managingCookiesIntro: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to:
legal.cookieContactUs: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at {email}.
legal.sharingItem2Description: trusted third-party services that help operate our website (e.g., hosting, analytics)
legal.sharingItem3Description: if required by law, court order, or governmental regulation
legal.userContentProhibited: You agree not to post content that:
legal.userContentProhibitedItem1: Is unlawful, harmful, threatening, abusive, or harassing
legal.userContentProhibitedItem2: Infringes on copyrights, trademarks, or other intellectual property rights
legal.userContentProhibitedItem3: Contains viruses, malware, or other harmful code
legal.userContentProhibitedItem4: Is spam, unsolicited advertising, or promotional material
legal.acceptableUseItem1: Use the service for any illegal purpose
legal.acceptableUseItem2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the system
legal.acceptableUseItem3: Interfere with the proper functioning of the service
legal.acceptableUseItem4: Scrape, crawl, or collect data without our written consent
legal.acceptableUseItem5: Create multiple accounts to circumvent restrictions
legal.intellectualPropertyDescription: The {siteName} name, logo, website design, and original content are the property of {siteName} and are protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our written permission.
legal.terminationDescription: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately.
legal.disclaimerDescription: The service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.
legal.limitationLiabilityDescription: To the maximum extent permitted by law, {siteName} shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
legal.changesToTermsDescription: We may modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal.essentialCookiesIntro: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They include:
legal.essentialCookieItem1Description: to keep you logged in during your session
legal.analyticsCookiesDescription: We may use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website. These cookies help us measure traffic, identify popular pages, and improve the user experience.
legal.preferenceCookiesDescription: These cookies remember your preferences (such as dark mode or language settings) to personalise your experience.
legal.managingCookieItem1: View what cookies are stored and delete them individually
legal.managingCookieItem5: Delete all cookies when you close the browser
legal.managingCookiesNote: Please note that blocking essential cookies may prevent you from using certain features of the website, such as logging in.
legal.thirdPartyCookiesDescription: We may use third-party services (such as analytics providers) that set their own cookies. We do not control those cookies. Please refer to the respective third-party privacy policies for information on their cookies.
legal.changesToCookiePolicyDescription: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
